_meta.integrity_flag: Several model numbers in buses-catalog.ts (JS6760GH, JS6730GHBEV, JS6850HBEV, JS6851HBEV, JS6906HBEV, JS6690GHEV, YBL9900XHBEV) do NOT appear on asiastarbuses.com, chinabuses.org or any dealer listing. Likely originated from offline sales materials or unverified distributor sheets.
